authority_name: U.S. Food and Drug Administration — FAERS
status_note: Structured per the public ICH E2B(R3) standard that FAERS is based on. This is a simplified illustrative mapping, NOT validated against FDA's actual Safety Reporting Portal / ESG gateway submission requirements. Verify against FDA's current technical specs before any real submission.
submission_endpoint: PLACEHOLDER — real submission requires FDA ESG (Electronic Submissions Gateway) registration
